# Regenerate with: pip-compile pyproject.toml -o requirements.txt
#
# Core dependencies for gaia-study (The Subconscious)

# gaia-common[vector] is installed separately via volume mount
# -e /gaia-common[vector]

fastapi>=0.115.0
uvicorn>=0.29.0
httpx>=0.25.0
sentence-transformers>=2.7.0
chromadb>=0.4.24

# QLoRA training dependencies
# Pin transformers <5.0: transformers 5.3.0 has a regression in core_model_loading.py
# that materializes ALL bf16 weights to GPU before BnB quantization, causing OOM
# on 16GB cards with 8B models. transformers 4.57.x loads per-shard correctly.
transformers>=4.46.0,<5.0
peft>=0.13.0
bitsandbytes>=0.44.0
datasets>=3.0.0
trl>=0.12.0
accelerate>=1.0.0

# Quantization toolchain (merge+requantize pipeline)
# AutoAWQ: bf16 → AWQ quantization (GPU, ~10min for 9B)
autoawq>=0.2.0
# gguf: HuggingFace → GGUF conversion (used by llama.cpp convert script)
gguf>=0.6.0
